title: Student Performance Prediction
short: Predicts student academic performance using machine learning.
description: Built a predictive ML model to forecast student academic performance with 89% accuracy. Performed feature engineering and cross-validation.

title: Real-Time Face Detection & Recognition
short: Real-time face detection and recognition system.
description: Developed advanced face detection system achieving 95% accuracy and real-time recognition capabilities.

title: Interactive Data Analysis Dashboard
short: Dashboard for visualizing and analyzing large datasets.
description: Created an interactive dashboard with real-time filtering and dynamic charts using Plotly Dash.

title: NLP Toolkit
short: Sentiment analysis and text processing tools.
description: Built NLP pipelines for sentiment analysis, keyword extraction and text classification.
